pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py output path check

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses the bundled ReqView "ExampleProject" (synthetic data). The task requires searching the "SRS" document (stored as documents/SRS.json) for the term "monitor". An exhaustive search of the "SRS.json" document confirms that the term "monitor" does not exist anywhere within it (0 occurrences). Therefore, the correct ground truth is that there are 0 matching requirements. A correct agent execution will report "Total Matches: 0" and list no requirement IDs.
